title: ICUBE-Q Lunar Mission
shortDescription: Pakistan's lunar CubeSat aboard Chang'e-6. Flagship visibility and senior PI framing.
description: ICUBE-Q is Pakistan's inaugural lunar CubeSat mission, launched aboard China's Chang'e-6 lunar probe. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as one of three Principal Investigators for the payload.
partners: China National Space Administration, Chang'e-6 mission

sections.title: Mission Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-Q represents a significant milestone in Pakistan's space program. As one of three Principal Investigators, I led payload development, integration, and mission operations for this lunar CubeSat.

sections.title: Objectives
sections.content: The mission advances lunar science, demonstrates small satellite capabilities for deep space, and builds national capacity in space systems engineering. ICUBE-Q contributes to the global lunar exploration effort.

title: SSS-2A
shortDescription: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A with Shanghai Jiao Tong. Pakistan-side technical leadership.
description: APSCO Student Small Satellite-2A. Developed in collaboration with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. Dr. Rehan Mahmood served as technical lead from the Pakistan side.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: SSS-2A is APSCO's Student Small Satellite-2A, developed collaboratively with Shanghai Jiao Tong University. As technical lead from the Pakistan side, I coordinated engineering, integration, and validation.

sections.title: Objectives
sections.content: The program advances student satellite capabilities across the APSCO region and strengthens international collaboration in small satellite development.

title: ICUBE-N
shortDescription: National CubeSat initiative. Leadership and program-building.
description: National CubeSat initiative advancing small satellite capabilities and building institutional capacity.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-N is Pakistan's National CubeSat program, advancing small satellite capabilities and building institutional capacity in space systems engineering.

title: ICUBE-1
shortDescription: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Foundational credibility.
description: Pakistan's first university CubeSat. Educational program for hands-on space systems training and technology demonstration.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-1 was Pakistan's first university CubeSat, providing hands-on training in CubeSat design, development, and operations. The program established foundational credibility for subsequent ICUBE missions.

title: NTN–PPDR Simulator
shortDescription: NGN/NTN–PPDR digital twin for scenario evaluation, resilient comms, and KPI analytics.
description: NGN/NTN–PPDR digital twin for scenario evaluation, resilient communications, terrestrial and non-terrestrial integration, and KPI analytics. Operator-facing simulator for public protection and disaster relief.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The NTN–PPDR simulator is a digital twin for evaluating Next Generation Network and Non-Terrestrial Network scenarios in public protection and disaster relief contexts.

sections.title: Capabilities
sections.content: Scenario evaluation, resilient communications modeling, terrestrial and non-terrestrial integration, and KPI analytics for operator-facing decision support.

title: KidSat
shortDescription: Educational satellite program for youth engagement.
description: Educational satellite program for youth engagement in space technology and STEM outreach.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: KidSat engages young students in satellite technology and space science through hands-on educational activities.

title: ICUBE-CSAT
description: CubeSat in the ICUBE program series.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: ICUBE-CSAT contributes to the broader ICUBE program objectives.
